text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's your birthday? Then I'll cast a spell that'll
make all your wishes come true!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you two... thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. ♪ This is nothing to me. Umm, okay, close
your eyes...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And picture a blue fairy in your head. Then, in a
whisper, say "hyacinth, cyahinth."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's the spell from <i>Ao's Magical Adventures,
<i> isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
"Hyacinth, cyahinth, hyacinthia." Then you open
your eyes and trace a star with your finger, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've read that book too! You draw a star,
then... make a wish, was it?
